name: PAR TECHNOLOGY CORP
summary: PAR Technology Corporation provides unified technology platforms for the restaurant and retail industries. Its products include PAR POS point-of-sale systems, Punchh loyalty and engagement platform, PAR Ordering digital ordering solutions, PAR OPS operations management, Data Central back-office analytics, Delaget restaurant analytics, PAR Retail solutions, and PAR Pay payment services. The company serves multi-unit restaurant brands and retail operators with both software-as-a-service and hardware offerings.
